_patch_meta.description: Stage 1 field-level corrections for registry 064 (forgiveness). Patches dim_review_status and dim_review_version on word_registry — Dimension Review was completed (all 14 groups at CLAUDE_AI confidence) but registry-level status fields were not updated.

operations.description: Set dim_review_status=Complete and dim_review_version — Dimension Review confirmed complete from group-level CLAUDE_AI confidence; registry status fields not previously updated
